articles.title: Does Bumrah need a break? 'Sit and have a chat with him,' our experts say
articles.description: Jasprit Bumrah conceded 31 in his two powerplay overs against LSG, bowled wides and no-balls, and didn't pick up a wicket to continue his poor run in IPL 2026

articles.title: Ryan's World: 'chemistry' with Rohit, 'healthy competition' with de Kock, and lots of runs

articles.title: Sydney Sixers appoint James Hopes as new BBL coach
articles.description: James Hopes called Sydney Sixers "a club with a proud history and a strong identity built on consistency, competitiveness and connection with its fans"

articles.title: New twist in Rajasthan Royals ownership as Indian businessman Lakshmi Mittal acquires franchise
articles.description: A US-based consortium had won the bid for RR in March but their deal hasn't gone through

articles.title: ‘Haven’t yet closed that chapter’ - Jason Holder makes big claim on Test career
articles.description: Holder delivered a match-winning spell of 4/24 against Punjab Kings on Sunday, helping GT register their third win on the trot.

articles.title: Nigar Sultana handed demerit point for throwing bat on ground after dismissal
articles.description: Nigar was found to have breached Article 2.2 of the ICC Code of Conduct, which relates to “abuse of cricket equipment or clothing, ground equipment or fixtures and fittings."
